name: Andrés Manuel López Obrador
quote: We will know the truth about what happened to the 43 students from Ayotzinapa.

name: Vidulfo Rosales
quote: The families will not stop until all 43 are found and those responsible are held accountable.

name: UN Committee on Enforced Disappearances
quote: Mexico must conduct a thorough, independent investigation and bring all perpetrators to justice.
